slides.headline: John thought an AI receptionist was a gimmick.
slides.body: He runs a plumbing firm. He'd heard the hype. He wasn't buying it. Swipe.

slides.headline: So we didn't argue. We started tiny.
slides.body: It only answered the calls he always missed anyway — after 6pm and weekends.

slides.label: after-hours calls answered and booked — jobs he'd never have seen

slides.headline: Now it answers every call.
slides.body: Day, night, mid-job. John just turns up to work that's already booked in.

slides.headline: Sceptical like John? Start with after-hours.
slides.body: See what you're missing — free audit, link in bio.
slides.save: Save this if you've ever doubted it
